title: Drift explains $280M exploit as critics question Circle over USDC freeze
summary: Drift said a durable nonce attack helped drive its Solana exploit, as critics questioned why stolen USDC moved for hours without a freeze.

title: The bitcoin treasury boom is unwinding as some companies and governments sell holdings
summary: Falling prices and prolonged consolidation are pushing public firms and sovereign holders to liquidate bitcoin reserves to shore up balance sheets.
source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data

title: Beyond T-bills: OpenEden introduces tokenized high-yield corporate bond
summary: The product further expands the tokenized real-world asset market beyond cash-equivalent and treasury strategies, which currently dominate the sector.
source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data

title: Metaplanet acquires 5,075 BTC, jumps to third largest bitcoin treasury company
summary: Japan-based firm strengthens its position with nearly $400 million purchase, surpassing MARA Holdings in global rankings.
source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data

title: Ripple Treasury puts XRP and RLUSD inside corporate finance for the first time
summary: The treasury management system, built on Ripple's 2025 acquisition of GTreasury, lets CFOs view and manage digital assets alongside fiat in a single dashboard without separate custody or wallet infrastructure.
source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Crypto News and Price Data
